tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose control or prediabetes. Creatinine is slightly above normal, which may indicate reduced kidney function; monitoring renal status is advised. All other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend follow-up for glycemic control and renal function assessment.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
